hero.tagline: Born to Roam. Built to Rule.

overview.minides: Badmos by nature, unstoppable by design — the Thar carries the swag of the streets and the capability of a true off-roader.
overview.description: The 2025 Mahindra Thar facelift is offered in two broad trims — AXT and LXT — across 7 variants. AXT is entry-level with 1.5L diesel RWD only. LXT spans 6 variants with 1.5L diesel, 2.0L turbo-petrol and 2.2L mHawk diesel, across RWD and 4WD in manual and automatic options. Key upgrades include a body-coloured grille, new steering wheel, rear AC vents, door-mounted power windows, 10.25-inch touchscreen (LXT), and Adventure Stats Gen II.
